message:
fix(runtime,time): yield_now panics on repoll; timeout reset unconditional

Two fail-closed hardening changes:

1. yield_now: Changed from returning Ready(()) on repoll to panicking
   with "yield_now future polled after completion". This catches
   incorrect executor behavior that polls a completed one-shot future.
   Test updated to verify the panic.

2. TimeoutFuture::reset/reset_after: The completed/timed_out flags are
   now cleared unconditionally instead of only when timed_out was true.
   This allows resetting a timeout that completed successfully (inner
   future resolved before deadline), not just one that timed out.
   Previously, reset() on a completed-but-not-timed-out future would
   leave it in completed state, silently doing nothing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
